title: Chill Create
description: A modpack that is based around the Create mod with a lot of addons including Valkyrien Skies: Clockwork.
body:
![Chill Create Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/358ce00b38adfb63a84b533b12401c34b2f7ebd0.png)
Chill Create is a modpack based around the Create mod with lots of addons including Valkyrien Skies Clockwork.

It also includes worldgen mods such as Terrestria, BetterNether, BetterEnd and ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village.
